dimensions.description_en: How convincing is the argument to an adjudicator?
dimensions.description_zh: 论证对审查官的说服力如何？

dimensions.description_en: Are claims backed by specific evidence?
dimensions.description_zh: 主张是否有具体证据支持？

dimensions.description_en: Does it correctly apply the regulatory standard?
dimensions.description_zh: 是否正确适用了法规标准？

dimensions.description_en: Is the structure clear and professionally written?
dimensions.description_zh: 结构是否清晰，语言是否专业？
